---
title: "nlc_comfam_comfamqc"
author: "Wendy Wen"
date: "2026-06-10"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
devtools::load_all()
```
```{r}
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(gamm4)

ADNIDataset <- read_csv("/Users/sw0214/Desktop/run_NLC/combatfam/ADNIDataset.csv")
COMB <- ADNIDataset
Feat <- c(18,19,26,27,30,31,39,40,51,52,62,63,66,67,116,117,132,133,148,149)
COMB_USE <- COMB[,c(1:15,Feat)]
d <- trimws(COMB_USE$Diagnosis_nearest_2.0)
COMB <- COMB_USE[!is.na(d) & d != "", ]
data_features <- COMB[, 16:35]
bat <- as.factor(COMB$Study)
subid <- as.factor(COMB$participant_id)
covar <- COMB[c("Age", "DLICV_baseline", "Sex", "Diagnosis_nearest_2.0")]

combat_result <- comfam(
  data = data_features,
  bat = bat,
  covar = covar,
  model = gamm4,
  formula = y ~ s(Age, bs='cr', k=100) + DLICV_baseline + Sex + Diagnosis_nearest_2.0,
  random = ~(1|subid),
  eb = TRUE,
  robust.LS = FALSE)
```
```{r}
# Extract harmonized features
harm_df <- as.data.frame(combat_result$dat.combat)
colnames(harm_df) <- colnames(COMB)[16:35]

# Combine metadata (cols 2:15, skipping row index col 1) + harmonized features
COMB_harmonized <- cbind(COMB[, 2:15], harm_df)

cat("Dimensions:", nrow(COMB_harmonized), "rows x", ncol(COMB_harmonized), "cols\n")

readr::write_csv(COMB_harmonized, "/Users/sw0214/Desktop/run_NLC/harmonized_data/comfamqc_harmonized.csv")
cat("Saved to harmonized_data/comfamqc_harmonized.csv\n")

comfamqc_check <- readr::read_csv("/Users/sw0214/Desktop/run_NLC/harmonized_data/comfamqc_harmonized.csv")
head(comfamqc_check)
```
```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)

# Load all three harmonized datasets
comfamqc_harmonized <- readr::read_csv("/Users/sw0214/Desktop/run_NLC/harmonized_data/comfamqc_harmonized.csv")
comfam_harmonized   <- readr::read_csv("/Users/sw0214/Desktop/run_NLC/harmonized_data/comfam_harmonized.csv")
neuro_harmonized    <- readr::read_csv("/Users/sw0214/Desktop/run_NLC/harmonized_data/neurocombat_harmonized.csv")

feat_cols <- colnames(COMB)[16:35]

# Tag each dataset and combine
df_all <- bind_rows(
  comfamqc_harmonized %>% select(all_of(feat_cols)) %>% mutate(Source = "ComFamQC"),
  comfam_harmonized   %>% select(all_of(feat_cols)) %>% mutate(Source = "ComFam"),
  neuro_harmonized    %>% select(all_of(feat_cols)) %>% mutate(Source = "NeuroCombat")
) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(feat_cols), names_to = "Feature", values_to = "Value")

# Helper: density plot for a subset of sources
# Factor order controls draw order — last level is drawn on top
plot_density <- function(data, sources, title) {
  # Draw order: NeuroCombat (bottom) → ComFamQC → ComFam (top)
  draw_order <- c("NeuroCombat", "ComFamQC", "ComFam")
  ordered_sources <- draw_order[draw_order %in% sources]

  data %>%
    filter(Source %in% sources) %>%
    mutate(Source = factor(Source, levels = ordered_sources)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Value, color = Source, linetype = Source, linewidth = Source)) +
    geom_density(fill = NA) +
    facet_wrap(~ Feature, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "ComFamQC"    = "#E64B35",
      "ComFam"      = "#4DBBD5",
      "NeuroCombat" = "#999999"
    )) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
      "ComFamQC"    = "solid",
      "ComFam"      = "dotted",
      "NeuroCombat" = "solid"
    )) +
    scale_linewidth_manual(values = c(
      "ComFamQC"    = 0.8,
      "ComFam"      = 0.8,
      "NeuroCombat" = 0.5
    )) +
    labs(
      title     = title,
      x         = "Value",
      y         = "Density",
      color     = "Method",
      linetype  = "Method",
      linewidth = "Method"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92"),
      strip.text       = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.position  = "bottom"
    )
}

# Pairwise comparisons
p1 <- plot_density(df_all, c("ComFamQC", "ComFam"),      "ComFamQC vs ComFam")
p2 <- plot_density(df_all, c("ComFamQC", "NeuroCombat"), "ComFamQC vs NeuroCombat")
p3 <- plot_density(df_all, c("ComFam",   "NeuroCombat"), "ComFam vs NeuroCombat")

# All three together
p4 <- plot_density(df_all, c("ComFamQC", "ComFam", "NeuroCombat"), "All Three Methods")

print(p1)
print(p2)
print(p3)
print(p4)
```

```{r}
# Boxplots per feature, methods side by side
df_all %>%
  mutate(Source = factor(Source, levels = c("ComFamQC", "ComFam", "NeuroCombat"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Source, y = Value, fill = Source, color = Source)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.8, outlier.size = 0.5, outlier.alpha = 0.4,
               linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey30") +
  facet_wrap(~ Feature, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "ComFamQC"    = "#E64B35",
    "ComFam"      = "#4DBBD5",
    "NeuroCombat" = "#999999"
  )) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "ComFamQC"    = "#E64B35",
    "ComFam"      = "#4DBBD5",
    "NeuroCombat" = "#999999"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Feature Distributions by Harmonization Method",
    x     = NULL,
    y     = "Value",
    fill  = "Method",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.background  = element_rect(fill = "grey92"),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text.x       = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x      = element_blank(),
    legend.position   = "bottom"
  )
```
